item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-012","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"第二轮明确把讨论范围锁定到 ReAct 循环本身，但没有把范围纠正误当成定义授权；仍拒绝“ReAct 循环就是 Agent 能力本质”的归约，改判为“最小行为闭环之一 / 核心行为闭环”。没有出现“可以说是本质”等让步信号。"}
